name: softcurse-livescriptor
description: Softcurse LiveScriptor — Advanced Next-Gen IDE by Softcurse Lab
author: Softcurse Lab

scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -k -n api,vite,electron "pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "pnpm --filter @workspace/livescriptor run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && node electron/launch.js"
scripts.electron:build: pnpm -r --if-present run build && node electron/build.mjs && electron-builder
scripts.electron:pack: pnpm -r --if-present run build && node electron/build.mjs && electron-builder --dir
